title: Smoking History and High-Risk Screening Eligibility Extraction Schema
description: Schema for structured smoking history and lung cancer high-risk screening eligibility information extracted from discharge notes.

eligibility_criteria.title: High-Risk Screening Eligibility Criteria Reference
eligibility_criteria.description: Reference definitions for guideline criteria used when eligibility is determined from discharge note evidence.

USPSTF_2021.description: USPSTF 2021 lung cancer screening criteria: age 50 to 80 years, at least 20 pack-years, and current smoker or quit within the last 15 years.

min_age.description: Minimum eligible age in years under USPSTF 2021.

max_age.description: Maximum eligible age in years under USPSTF 2021.

min_pack_years.description: Minimum cumulative tobacco exposure in pack-years under USPSTF 2021.

max_years_since_quit.description: Maximum allowed years since quitting smoking under USPSTF 2021.

Chinese_2021.description: Chinese 2021 lung cancer screening criteria: age 40 years or older, at least 20 pack-years or a cigarette-year index of at least 400, and current smoker or quit within the last 15 years.

min_age.description: Minimum eligible age in years under Chinese 2021 guidance.

min_pack_years.description: Minimum cumulative tobacco exposure in pack-years under Chinese 2021 guidance.

min_cigarette_year_index.description: Minimum cigarette-year index threshold under Chinese 2021 guidance.

max_years_since_quit.description: Maximum allowed years since quitting smoking under Chinese 2021 guidance.

subject_id.description: Unique patient identifier associated with the discharge note.

note_id.description: Discharge note identifier in MIMIC-style format such as 10014967-DS-11.

source_section.description: Section of the discharge note where the smoking evidence was found, such as Social History, HPI, Past Medical History, or Assessment.

smoking_status_raw.description: Original smoking-related text copied verbatim from the source note.

oneOf.description: Normalized smoking status label derived from the note text.
Null when smoking status cannot be determined from the note.

smoking_status_norm.description: Normalized smoking status label mapped from raw note evidence, or null if unavailable.

pack_year_value.description: Numeric pack-year value extracted from the note when explicitly documented.

pack_year_text.description: Original pack-year expression from the note, such as 46 pack year.

ppd_value.description: Numeric packs-per-day value extracted from the note.

ppd_text.description: Original packs-per-day expression from the note, such as 1.5 ppd.

years_smoked_value.description: Numeric duration of smoking in years when explicitly documented or normalized from text.

years_smoked_text.description: Original duration expression from the note, such as 30+ years.

quit_years_value.description: Numeric estimate of years since quitting smoking when derivable from the note.

quit_years_text.description: Original expression describing smoking cessation timing, such as a couple of years ago.

evidence_span.description: Exact text span that supports the extracted smoking or screening eligibility information.

ever_smoker_flag.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the patient has any lifetime smoking history based on available evidence.

eligible_for_high_risk_screening.description: Eligibility status for high-risk lung cancer screening; unknown must be used when the note lacks sufficient evidence for a confident determination.

oneOf.description: Guideline or trial criteria applied to derive the eligibility judgment.
Null when no eligibility criteria could be applied from the available evidence.

eligibility_criteria_applied.description: Name of the eligibility framework used for the determination, or null if not applicable.

eligibility_reason.description: Free-text explanation describing why the patient is eligible, not eligible, or unknown under the applied criteria.

evidence_quality.description: Quality assessment of the supporting evidence based on explicitness, completeness, ambiguity, and de-identification.

extraction_metadata.description: Metadata describing the extraction system version, extraction time, and model used to produce the structured record.

extractor_version.description: Version identifier of the extraction pipeline or prompt configuration.

extraction_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the extraction record was generated, formatted as an ISO 8601 date-time string.

model_name.description: Name of the model or system that produced the extraction.

missing_flags.description: List of field names that could not be extracted or confidently inferred from the note.

items.description: Name of a missing or unresolvable field in this extraction record.

data_quality_notes.description: Optional notes about ambiguity, de-identification, conflicting statements, or other extraction quality concerns.
